description_long: This barbecue grill features a cylindrical, horizontally-oriented cooking chamber with a hinged lid that opens upward, revealing a spacious grilling surface. The lid is a glossy red color and includes a central handle for easy lifting. The main body of the grill is matte black, with a perforated metal grate inside for cooking food. The grill stands on four sturdy metallic legs, providing stability and elevating it to a comfortable working height. There are no visible wheels or side shelves, giving it a compact and utilitarian appearance. The overall design suggests it is intended for charcoal grilling, suitable for use in parks, backyards, or urban recreational areas.
description: A compact, cylindrical charcoal barbecue grill with a red hinged lid, black cooking chamber, and four metal legs. The design is simple and functional, lacking wheels or side shelves.
description_view_0: Front view shows the closed red lid, central handle, and the four supporting legs.
description_view_1: Side view with the lid open, revealing the black grilling surface and the curved profile of the lid.
description_view_2: Rear view with the lid fully open, exposing the entire grilling grate and the interior of the lid.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the lid open, showing the depth of the cooking chamber and the supporting legs.
